# Enabling features for web developers

**Article**

Enable features and settings for web developers in Safari.

## 

Safari on macOS has several tools for web developers, including the [doc://com.apple.safari.developer-tools/documentation/Safari-Developer-Tools/develop-menu], [doc://com.apple.safari.developer-tools/documentation/Safari-Developer-Tools/web-inspector], and [doc://com.apple.safari.developer-tools/documentation/Safari-Developer-Tools/webdriver], which are turned off by default. To enable these tools:

1. From the menu bar, choose **Safari**.
2. Select **Settings…** (⌘,).
3. Go to the **Advanced** pane.
4. Check the **Show features for web developers** checkbox.
title: Enabling features for web developers
